seoTitle: Bethungra vs Beverley Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bethungra and Beverley Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bethungra vs Beverley Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bethungra and Beverley Park.
heading: Bethungra vs Beverley Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bethungra, New South Wales and Beverley Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bethungra has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Beverley Park (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bethungra or Beverley Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bethungra has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Beverley Park scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bethungra scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Beverley Park scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bethungra or Beverley Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bethungra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
